testsuite.name: com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.controller.ChatHistoryControllerTest

testcase.name: User_ID_헤더_없을_때_실패()

failure.message: jakarta.servlet.ServletException: Request processing failed: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.dto.ChatHistoryResponse.getTotalCount()" because "response" is null
